title: add latent heat to surface energy flux

body:
This PR adds two important files---`rrtmgp_model.jl` and `radiation_utilities.jl`.

`rrtmgp_model.jl`is a user-friendly wrapper for `RRTMGP.jl` that is able to automatically handle extension profiles, boundary layers, and interpolation/extrapolation schemes, as well as expose all the relevant inputs/outputs of `RRTMGP` to users while hiding all  the irrelevant data structures. We will eventually move this file into the `RRTMGP.jl` repository, but, for the sake of faster development, we should keep it here until we have settled on the final interface.

`radiation_utilities.jl` is the equivalent of `baroclinic_wave_utilities.jl` for radiation; it introduces a cache function, a tendency function, and a callback function that use an `RRTMGPModel`. A lot of information is currently hardcoded into these functions (e.g., volume mixing ratios of gases are read in from a dataset provided with `RRTMGP`, and the land surface temperature is set to `29 * exp(-(ϕ / 26)^2 / 2) + 271`), but we will add more versatility as we continue to experiment.

This PR also adds a new `baroclinic_wave_rhoe_equilmoist_radiation.jl` example to the Buildkite pipeline. This example demonstrates how to use `radiation_utilities.jl`. Since it is not very physically meaningful, this example will eventually be removed, so a regression test does not need to be added for it.
title: Add RRTMGPModel and radiation cache/tendency/callback
